title: hieracium pannosum subsp. strigulosum
intro: Hieracium pannosum subsp. strigulosum, a subspecies of the Hieracium genus, is a type of flowering plant also known as woolly hawkweed. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be beneficial in treating wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Hieracium pannosum subsp. strigulosum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing antimicrobial protection. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture for medicinal use, with the leaves and flowers typically being used in herbal preparations.
